description_long: This is a sleek, black coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear wing spoiler, suggesting a high-performance or racing design. The car features a wide, aggressive front fascia with angular headlights and a bold grille, while the hood is smooth with subtle sculpting. The side view reveals large, sporty wheels with blue accents and low-profile tires, as well as a streamlined roofline that slopes gently toward the rear. The rear of the car is equipped with distinctive round taillights, a thin horizontal brake light, and a large, blue-accented spoiler for added downforce. The windows are tinted, and the roof has visible blue detailing, adding to the car's modern, performance-oriented aesthetic. The text 'SDC PERFORMANCE' is visible on the windshield, further emphasizing its sporty character.
description: A black, high-performance coupe car with blue accents, a large rear spoiler, and sporty wheels. It features aggressive styling, tinted windows, and 'SDC PERFORMANCE' branding on the windshield.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, angular headlights, and 'SDC PERFORMANCE' text on the windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coupe's low profile, blue-accented wheels, and large rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the round taillights, thin brake light, and prominent blue-accented spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the streamlined roofline, blue wheels, and rear spoiler.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
